bundles.title: Extend Watch Model Contracts
bundles.goal: Define the pure model interfaces required for manual-fix state, sticky review visibility, child tasks, and approval summary data.

tasks.title: Extend WatchModelHeader, ReviewRoundView, BundleView, ApprovalSummaryView, and WatchModel with the new fields described in the design
Thread the new task and section-state shapes through the existing model contracts so downstream builders and renderers can consume them without changing section order

bundles.title: Expand Watch Artifact Readers
bundles.goal: Add the pure reader behavior needed to keep review snapshots visible across phase families and to extract approval summary data from archived artifacts.

tasks.title: Expand selectActiveAutofixPhase to map design_draft/design_review/design_ready to design_review and apply_draft/apply_review/apply_ready/approved to apply_review
Add ApprovalSummaryExtract and readApprovalSummary with tolerant Status and diffstat extraction plus tagged absent/missing/ok outcomes

bundles.title: Improve Review And Event Visibility
bundles.goal: Make recent events concrete and keep review/manual-fix context visible across adjacent phases without changing the existing watch layout.

tasks.title: Update eventSummary to render concrete phase, gate, trigger, outcome, and resolved-response text from RawObservationEvent fields
Add manual-fix derivation plus review-family visibility and manual_fix_open_count logic in buildHeader and buildReviewView
Render the header manual-fix badge and review live/completed plus manual-fix lines while preserving the current section order and renderer diff behavior

bundles.title: Expose Bundle Child Tasks
bundles.goal: Project bundle child tasks into the watch model and render them as a persistent tree beneath each bundle summary.

tasks.title: Populate BundleView.tasks from the task graph and force child display_status to done when the parent bundle is done
Render the child task tree with box-drawing glyphs, task status markers, and existing truncation behavior for narrow terminals

bundles.title: Wire Approval Summary Into Watch
bundles.goal: Surface approval summary data in the watch frame and watch process without introducing any new write-side behavior.

tasks.title: Add buildApprovalSummary to translate readApprovalSummary results into the new WatchModel approval_summary section state
Implement renderApprovalSection and append it after Recent events in renderFrame
Update src/bin/specflow-watch.ts to pass the expanded model shape and add approval-summary.md to watchedPaths only when last_summary_path is present

bundles.title: Unify Watch Launch Dispatcher
bundles.goal: Replace fragile platform-specific watch launch snippets with one inline cross-platform Bash dispatcher used by both command templates.

tasks.title: Add the inline launch_watch Bash dispatcher to specflow.watch.md.tmpl with tmux, screen, osascript, TERMINAL, Linux emulator, and manual fallback branches
Replace /specflow Step 3.7 with the same dispatcher while preserving SPECFLOW_NO_WATCH opt-out semantics only for /specflow

bundles.title: Verify Watch UX Regression Coverage
bundles.goal: Protect the new watch UX and launcher behavior with targeted reader, renderer, integration, and snapshot coverage.

tasks.title: Add reader unit tests for expanded selectActiveAutofixPhase mappings and approval summary extraction outcomes
Extend watch-renderer tests to cover concrete event summaries, sticky review visibility, manual-fix indicators, and task tree rendering
Extend the --once integration coverage with apply_ready persistence plus manual-fix and approval-summary fixtures
Regenerate template and renderer snapshots and verify the new dispatcher text replaces the old open -a Terminal flow
